name: 見積作成依頼コントローラ

overview.purpose: LWCコンポーネント（request）からの各種処理要求を受け付け、見積・連絡先・外部取引先の作成・更新を行う
overview.trigger: 見積作成依頼フォーム（LWC: request）からの @AuraEnabled メソッド呼び出し
overview.preconditions: BusinessTraveler__c・BusinessTravelerHeader__c・Quote__c が存在すること。CommonUtil クラスが利用可能であること
overview.summary: 11の @AuraEnabled メソッドで構成されるAuraコントローラ。見積の下書き保存・確定作成（単票/ヘッダー経由）、連絡先の作成・更新、外部取引先の登録、閲覧権限データの設定、画面初期データの取得など、見積作成依頼フォームのバックエンド処理を一括して担う

steps.title: 見積下書き保存
steps.detail: BusinessTraveler__c を取得し、入力値で見積（Quote__c）を下書き状態として upsert する

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id FROM BusinessTraveler__c WHERE Id = :recordIdList[0]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPSERT quote

steps.title: 見積作成（単票）
steps.detail: BusinessTraveler__c・ユーザー・商品一覧条件・プロダクトを取得し、見積（Quote__c）と見積明細（ProductListConditionDetail__c）を作成。カスタム通知をグループメンバーに送信する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, ApplicantName__c,Status__c, BusinessTravelerHeader__c, BusinessTravelerHeader__r.Account__r.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM BusinessTraveler__c WHERE Id IN :recordIdList]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, ContactId FROM User WHERE Id = :userId]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id FROM ProductListCondition__c WHERE ServiceMaster__c = :(Id)conditionsMap.get('serviceMaster') AND ApplicationTypeMasterId__c = :(Id)conditionsMap.get('applicationType') AND ResponseSpeed__c = :(String)conditionsMap.get('supportSpeed') ]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, Product__c, Amount__c, Remarks__c, Taxable__c FROM ProductListConditionDetail__c WHERE ProductListCondition__c = :PLC[0]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, QuantityType__c FROM Product__c WHERE Id IN :productIds ]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM CustomNotificationType WHERE DeveloperName='NotificationQuoteCreate']

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT (SELECT UserOrGroupId FROM GroupMembers) FROM Group where DeveloperName = 'Group_QuoteRequest']

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPDATE btList

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPSERT insertQuoteList

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: INSERT insertQuoteDetailList

steps.title: 見積作成（ヘッダー経由）
steps.detail: BusinessTravelerHeader__c 経由で見積を作成する。見積upsert後、カスタム通知をグループに送信する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, Account__c, Account__r.Name FROM BusinessTravelerHeader__c WHERE Id = :recordId ]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, ContactId FROM User WHERE Id = :userId]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id ,BusinessTraveler__r.BusinessTravelerHeader__r.Account__r.Name ,ApplicantNameBT__c FROM Quote__c WHERE Id = :quote.Id]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM CustomNotificationType WHERE DeveloperName='NotificationQuoteCreate']

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT (SELECT UserOrGroupId FROM GroupMembers) FROM Group where DeveloperName = 'Group_QuoteRequest']

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPSERT quote

steps.title: 連絡先更新
steps.detail: 指定IDの Contact を取得し、請求先フラグ（IsInvoiceContact__c）・荷受人フラグ（IsConsignee__c）を更新する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, IsInvoiceContact__c, IsConsignee__c FROM Contact WHERE Id = :id]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPDATE ContactToUpdate

steps.title: 連絡先作成
steps.detail: メールアドレスで Contact・User の重複チェックを行い、未登録の場合のみ新規 Contact を insert する。CommonUtil.createUser で関連ユーザーを作成する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id FROM Contact WHERE Email = :email]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT COUNT() FROM User WHERE Email = :email]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: INSERT newContact

steps.title: 請求先連絡先作成
steps.detail: 請求先向けの Contact をメールアドレス重複チェック後に登録する。AccountId を取得して関連付ける

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Email = :email]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT COUNT() FROM User WHERE Email = :email]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: INSERT newContact

steps.title: 外部取引先登録
steps.detail: レコードタイプを取得し、同名・同取引先の ExternalAccount__c が未登録の場合のみ新規登録する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM RecordType WHERE DeveloperName = :recordTypeName]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id FROM ExternalAccount__c WHERE Name = :targetName AND Account__c = :accId AND RecordTypeId = :rtId]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: INSERT externalAccount

steps.title: 申請者連絡先更新
steps.detail: 申請者のメールアドレスで Contact を検索し、該当レコードを更新する

branch.text: 例外発生時はエラーをスロー
branch.label: catch

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id FROM Contact WHERE Email = :applicantEmail]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPDATE applicantContact

steps.title: 相談理解ステータス更新
steps.detail: BusinessTraveler__c のステータスを取得し、相談理解済みに更新する

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, Status__c FROM BusinessTraveler__c WHERE Id = :id]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPDATE businessTraveler

steps.title: 画面初期データ取得
steps.detail: 見積作成依頼フォームの初期表示に必要な BusinessTraveler__c・Quote__c・BusinessTravelerHeader__c の全項目を取得して返す。CommonUtil から各種選択肢（サービス/申請種別等）も取得する

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, Status__c, ConsultationResult__c, ConsultationResultContent__c, RequestInputPossible__c, BusinessTravelerHeader__r.Account__c, ServiceMaster__c, ServiceMaster__r.Name, ServiceMaster__r.Code__c, AssignedCompanyNameId__c, ApplicantLastName__c, ApplicantFirstName__c, ApplicantCompanyName__c, ApplicantEmail__c, LastModifiedDate, ApplicantCompanyId__c, ApplicantCompanyAccountId__c, ApplicantAppointedCompanyId__c, ApplicationTypeMaster__r.Name, ApplicantAppointedCompanyAccountId__c, PersonName__c, PersonEmail__c, ApplicantDepartment__c, HoldVisaType__c, ApplicantDirectAllowed__c, ContactPersonName__c, ContactPersonEmail__c, CcRequired__c, CcEmail__c, ContactStartDate__c, TrainingCompany__c, TrainingPeriod__c, ResponseSpeed__c, ApplicantVisaType__c, Tdy2__c, SameProject__c, NumberOfFamilyMembersRequiringVisa__c, CompanyNameToVisit__c FROM BusinessTraveler__c WHERE Id = :id ]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, QuoteIssuingCompanyId__c, QuoteIssuingCompanyAccountId__c, QuoteIssuingCompanyName__c, ConsigneeAttentionId__c, ConsigneeAttentionName__c, ConsigneeContactId1__c, ConsigneeContactId1AccountNameForMail__c, ConsigneeContactId1__r.DepartmentName__c, ConsigneeContactId1__r.Phone, ConsigneeContactId1__r.Email, ConsigneeContactId2__c, ConsigneeContactId2AccountNameForMail__c, ConsigneeContactId2__r.DepartmentName__c, ConsigneeContactId2__r.Phone, ConsigneeContactId2__r.Email, ConsigneeContactId3__c, ConsigneeContactId3AccountNameForMail__c, ConsigneeContactId3__r.DepartmentName__c, ConsigneeContactId3__r.Phone, ConsigneeContactId3__r.Email, ConsigneeContactId4__c, ConsigneeContactId4AccountNameForMail__c, ConsigneeContactId4__r.DepartmentName__c, ConsigneeContactId4__r.Phone, ConsigneeContactId4__r.Email, ConsigneeContactId5__c, ConsigneeContactId5AccountNameForMail__c, ConsigneeContactId5__r.DepartmentName__c, ConsigneeContactId5__r.Phone, ConsigneeContactId5__r.Email, SameAsConsignee__c, InvoiceBillingAccountId__c, InvoiceBillingId__c, InvoiceBillingEngName__c, InvoiceContactId__c, InvoiceContactId__r.Account.Name, InvoiceContactId__r.DepartmentName__c, InvoiceContactId__r.Email, InvoiceContactId2__c, InvoiceContactId2__r.Account.Name, InvoiceContactId2__r.DepartmentName__c, InvoiceContactId2__r.Email, InvoiceContactId3__c, InvoiceContactId3__r.Account.Name, InvoiceContactId3__r.DepartmentName__c, InvoiceContactId3__r.Email, InvoiceContactId4__c, InvoiceContactId4__r.Account.Name, InvoiceContactId4__r.DepartmentName__c, InvoiceContactId4__r.Email, InvoiceContactId5__c, InvoiceContactId5__r.Account.Name, InvoiceContactId5__r.DepartmentName__c, InvoiceContactId5__r.Email, FinancialUpdateRequired__c, IsGreenProgram__c, NumberOfVisaApplications__c, IsEnglishVersion__c, Note__c FROM Quote__c WHERE BusinessTraveler__c = :id AND Status__c = '見積作成依頼入力' LIMIT 1 ]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, Segment__c, Account__c FROM BusinessTravelerHeader__c WHERE Id = :id ]

steps.title: 閲覧権限データ作成
steps.detail: ユーザーと連絡先リストを取得し、見積の閲覧可能者（ViewAblePerson__c）を upsert する

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, ContactId FROM User WHERE Id = :userId or ContactId In :contactList]

sub_steps.title: SOQL
sub_steps.detail: [ SELECT Id, User__c, Quote__c FROM ViewAblePerson__c WHERE Quote__c = :quoteId AND User__c IN :resultIds ]

sub_steps.title: DML
sub_steps.detail: UPSERT upsertDatas

input.name: recordId / id
input.description: BusinessTraveler__c または BusinessTravelerHeader__c のレコードID

input.name: quoteData
input.description: 見積入力データ（メソッドにより異なる）

output.name: initData
output.description: getInitData: 画面初期表示用データ（BT・Quote・Header情報）

output.name: Boolean
output.description: 各更新系メソッド: 処理成功フラグ
